introSection:
Vértigo is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

This roller coaster was formerly half of the Speedy Bob attraction at Bobbejaanland.
fullText:
Vértigo is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

This roller coaster was formerly half of the Speedy Bob attraction at Bobbejaanland.



Beige track and brown supports
